concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types for the canonical MVVM harness.
concept.cypher: MATCH (packageNode:Package)-[:CONTAINS]->(type:Java:Type) WHERE packageNode.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.[^.]+(\\..*)?' WITH packageNode, type, split(packageNode.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType, type.component = segments[2], type.sharedViewComponent = segments[2] IN ['mapcanvas', 'dungeonmap'], type.bucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) = 3 THEN 'ROOT' WHEN segments[3] IN ['assembly', 'api', 'View', 'ViewModel', 'Model', 'Controller', 'interactor'] THEN segments[3] ELSE 'OTHER' END, type.relativePath = replace(packageNode.fqn, '.', '/') + '/' + coalesce(type.sourceFileName, type.name + '.java') RETURN type AS MvvmViewType
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.bucket = 'ROOT' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'ViewContribution' SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint RETURN type AS MvvmRootEntrypoint

constraint.description: Declarative MVVM topology allows normal components and declared shared components to use only their target buckets.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.bucket = 'OTHER' OR ( NOT type.sharedViewComponent AND type.bucket <> 'ROOT' AND NOT type.bucket IN ['View', 'ViewModel'] ) OR ( type.sharedViewComponent AND NOT type.bucket IN ['api', 'View', 'ViewModel'] ) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, CASE WHEN type.sharedViewComponent THEN 'src/view/<shared-component>/{api,View,ViewModel}' ELSE 'src/view/<component>/{<Component>ViewContribution.java,View,ViewModel}' END AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Bucket ausserhalb der deklarativen MVVM-Zieltopologie fuer normale oder deklarierte Shared View Components.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Legacy and transitional buckets are migration debt and must disappear from the target topology.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.bucket IN ['assembly', 'Model', 'Controller', 'interactor'] OR (type.bucket = 'api' AND NOT type.sharedViewComponent) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, CASE WHEN type.sharedViewComponent THEN 'api/View/ViewModel' ELSE 'View/ViewModel' END AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Legacy- oder unerlaubter Transitional-Bucket in der deklarativen MVVM-Zieltopologie.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Component roots may only host *ViewContribution classes.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.bucket = 'ROOT' AND NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' AND ( type.sharedViewComponent OR NOT type.name ENDS WITH 'ViewContribution' ) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, CASE WHEN type.sharedViewComponent THEN 'kein Java-Root-Typ in deklarierter Shared View Component' ELSE 'src/view/<component>/<Component>ViewContribution.java' END AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Normale Komponenten haben nur den Shell-Entrypoint im Root; Shared View Components haben keinen Shell-Entrypoint.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Every component requires exactly one root entrypoint.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WITH DISTINCT type.component AS component, type.sharedViewComponent AS sharedViewComponent OPTIONAL MATCH (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint {component: component}) WITH component, collect(DISTINCT root.name) AS roots WITH component, [rootName IN roots WHERE rootName IS NOT NULL] AS roots, component IN ['mapcanvas', 'dungeonmap'] AS sharedViewComponent WHERE (sharedViewComponent AND size(roots) <> 0) OR (NOT sharedViewComponent AND size(roots) <> 1) RETURN 'src/view/' + component AS Source, CASE WHEN sharedViewComponent THEN '0x <Component>ViewContribution' ELSE '1x <Component>ViewContribution' END AS ExpectedDirection, coalesce(reduce(actual = '', rootName IN roots | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN rootName ELSE actual + ', ' + rootName END), '(none)') AS ActualDirection, 'Normale Komponenten haben genau einen Shell-Entrypoint; deklarierte Shared View Components haben keinen.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Declarative MVVM view components do not import foreign view component packages.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE source <> target AND source.component <> target.component AND NOT (target.sharedViewComponent AND target.bucket = 'api') RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'nur deklarierte fremde Shared-Component-api Pakete' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Komponentenuebergreifende View-Abhaengigkeiten duerfen nur auf deklarierte Shared-Component-api Pakete zeigen.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
